message:
test(fcp-core): pin ConnectorStateModel + ConnectorHealth + CrdtType serde (flywheel_connectors-p7lst)

Bead asks for ConnectorClass serde tag JSON+CBOR roundtrip. fcp-core
has no type literally named ConnectorClass; the connector-classifier
surface splits across ConnectorRoute (already pinned by tcox6),
ConnectorLifecycleState (already pinned), and three unpinned
classifiers:
- ConnectorStateModel (connector_state.rs:171, 3 variants Stateless
  /SingletonWriter/Crdt with #[serde(tag = "type", rename_all =
  "snake_case")]) — closest "ConnectorClass" analogue, the canonical
  "what kind of connector from a state-model standpoint" discriminant
- ConnectorHealth (health.rs:216, 3 variants Healthy/Degraded/
  Unavailable with #[serde(tag = "status", rename_all = "lowercase")])
- CrdtType (connector_state.rs:117, 4 variants nested inside
  ConnectorStateModel::Crdt)

Coverage:
- ConnectorStateModel per-variant `type` tag pinned (stateless /
  singleton_writer / crdt) with Crdt's flattened inner crdt_type
  field
- ConnectorStateModel Display per variant including parametrized
  Crdt form `crdt(<inner>)` covering all 4 CrdtType variants
- ConnectorStateModel JSON round-trip preserves variant + nested
  CrdtType for all 6 (3 unit + 4 Crdt × 1 unique CrdtType per case)
  configurations
- Default = Stateless (operator-visible default posture)
- Predicates truth table (is_stateless / is_singleton_writer /
  is_crdt / crdt_type()) for all 3 model variants
- CrdtType per-variant JSON tag (lww_map / or_set / g_counter /
  pn_counter) with JSON+CBOR round-trip per variant
- CrdtType Display agrees with as_str and serde tag byte-for-byte
- CrdtType count = 4 sentinel
- ConnectorHealth `status` tag pinned for all 3 variants (lowercase:
  healthy / degraded / unavailable) with internally-tagged form
  flattening reason and since fields
- ConnectorHealth JSON round-trip preserves nested fields for all 3
  variants
- ConnectorHealth CBOR carries `status` tag as Text in the encoded
  Map (Value-inspection workaround for Content-shim concerns on
  internally-tagged forms)
- PascalCase rejected on all three classifiers; camelCase rejected
  on ConnectorStateModel singletonWriter; unknown status rejected on
  ConnectorHealth — drift sentinels for any future rename_all swap

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
